question: A boat goes 24 km downstream in 3 hours and returns upstream in 4 hours. Find the speed of the boat in still water and the speed of the stream.
A boat goes downstream at 20 km/h and upstream at 10 km/h. What is the speed of the boat in still water?
Aman rows 24 km downstream in 3 hours and 18 km upstream in 6 hours. Find the speed of the boat in still water.
A man rows a boat 24 km downstream in 3 hours and 12 km upstream in 3 hours. Find the speed of the boat in still water.
A boat takes 2 hours to go 16 km downstream and 4 hours to return the same 16 km upstream. What is the speed of the stream?

24 . ./ 16 . ./ , शांत जल में एक नाव की गति कि मी घंटा है। यदि धारा के प्रतिकूल नाव की गति कि मी घंटा है तो धारा की ( . ./ ) ? गति कि मी घंटा में क्या है En: The speed of a boat in still water is 24 km/hr. If the upstream speed of the boat is 16 km/hr, then what is the speed (in km/hr) of the stream?
A boat can row 80 km upstream in 8 hours and the same distance downstream in 4 hours. What is the speed (in km/hr) of the boat in still water?
Upstream speed and downstream speed of a boat is and respectively. What is the difference (in ) between the speed of boat in still water and the speed of stream?
A man rows a distance of 72 km in still water in 8 hours. Speed of the stream is 6 km/hr. What is the downstream speed (in km/hr) of the man?

The speed of a boat in still water is 9 km/hr and the speed of the stream is 6 km/hr. The boat goes a distance of 90 km upstream and comes back to the starting point. What is the total time (in hours) taken by the boat?
Speed of a boat in still water is 24 km/hr and the speed of stream is 13 km/hr. What is the upstream speed (in km/hr) and downstream speed (in km/hr) of the boat?
The speed of a boat in still water is 25 km/hr. If the upstream speed of the boat is 19 km/hr, then what is the speed (in km/hr) of the stream?
Speed of a boat in still water is 18 km/hr and the speed of stream is 7 km/hr. What is the upstream speed (in km/hr) and downstream speed (in km/hr) of the boat?
Speed of a boat in still water is 18 km/hr. Speed of stream is 15 km/hr. What is the upstream speed (in km/hr) of the boat?
Ratio of downstream speed and upstream speed of a boat is 9 : 4. What is the ratio of speed of the boat in still water and speed of stream?

A boat takes 6 hours to travel 36 km downstream and 12 hours to travel the same distance upstream. Find the speed of the boat in still water. ⚠️ links will not give you any mock test. Please use only the original PDF.
